use_cases: Add visual flair and interactivity to SaaS landing pages and marketing sites
Create engaging cursor feedback on portfolio or personal showcase websites
Enhance user experience with subtle motion effects on creative platforms
Provide visual interest on product demo pages and feature introductions
Add interactive polish to hero sections without overwhelming content
ai_summary: An interactive pixel cursor trail component that renders grayscale pixels following the mouse movement path with smooth fade-out animation. Built with React hooks and requestAnimationFrame for performant continuous animation. Features configurable trail length, pixel size, and opacity fade speed for customization. Ideal for adding subtle visual polish and interactivity to SaaS landing pages, portfolios, and creative tool interfaces.
